name: Carrots with Dill
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice carrots into 1/8-inch slices.
2. Cut ginger into julienne strips and then into fine dice.
3. Heat oil in a wok until hot. Add cumin seeds. When the seeds begin to sizzle, add asafetida for about 5 seconds.
4. Add ginger and chopped chiles to the pan. Cook until the ginger turns light brown.
5. Stir in carrots, coriander seeds, and turmeric. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 2 minutes.
6. Mix in dill and salt. Continue cooking for another 2 minutes with the heat lowered.
7. Using a slotted spoon, lift the carrots out of the pan, leaving as much oil behind as possible.
(Note: This recipe is adapted from "A Taste of India" by Madhur Jaffrey.)
